## Global Market News, from 2026-05-27 to 2026-06-03:

### Fed Officials Flag Patience On Rate Cuts As Inflation Cools Slowly (source: Reuters)
Several policymakers said incoming data justify holding rates steady through the summer, pushing back on market pricing of an early move.
Link: https://finance.yahoo.com/news/fed-officials-flag-patience-rate-cuts-1.html

### Dollar Eases As Eurozone PMIs Surprise To The Upside (source: Bloomberg)
A firmer European growth pulse lifted the euro and weighed on the dollar index, easing pressure on emerging-market currencies.
Link: https://finance.yahoo.com/news/dollar-eases-eurozone-pmis-surprise-2.html

### Oil Steadies After OPEC+ Holds Output Targets Unchanged (source: Wall Street Journal)
Crude benchmarks held in a narrow range as the group kept supply policy on autopilot ahead of the seasonal demand peak.
Link: https://finance.yahoo.com/news/oil-steadies-opec-holds-output-3.html

### Chip Stocks Lead Asian Rally On AI Capex Optimism (source: Nikkei Asia)
Memory and foundry names rallied after fresh hyperscaler capital-expenditure guidance topped estimates for the third straight quarter.
Link: https://finance.yahoo.com/news/chip-stocks-lead-asian-rally-4.html

### Treasury Yields Drift Lower Ahead Of Payrolls Report (source: CNBC)
The 10-year yield slipped as traders positioned for Friday's jobs data, with breakevens little changed on the week.
Link: https://finance.yahoo.com/news/treasury-yields-drift-lower-payrolls-5.html
